headline: EXCLUSIVE: Forget SpaceX—This Company Wants To Launch Rockets, Land On The Moon And Build Defense Systems
summary: Firefly CEO Jason Kim outlines a strategy spanning launch, lunar and defense markets as the company expands beyond rockets.

headline: Northrop Grumman Deepens Role In DARPA Rocket Motor Program Progress
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) and Raytheon have moved their joint work on DARPA's Burn n' Go solid rocket motor program into phase two. The new phase focuses on more flexible and scalable missile propulsion technology for U.S. defense uses. The shift to phase two follows earlier feasibility work under the same government funded program. For you as an investor looking at NYSE:NOC, this project sits in the core of Northrop Grumman's defense and missile systems business, alongside its well known...
